issue_summary: Datto RMM reports an active incident where the RMM agent cannot be installed because of certificate errors across all listed platforms.
impact: MSP technicians may be unable to deploy new Datto RMM agents or complete onboarding/redeployment work across EU, US, and APAC platforms.
status: Investigating; latest official update posted 2026-04-02 17:09 EDT saying the team is continuing to investigate.
response_1: Pause non-urgent Datto RMM agent rollout/reinstall work and flag onboarding/rebuild tasks that depend on fresh agent installs.
response_2: Check the incident page before retrying installs, and use alternate monitoring/remote-access coverage for newly provisioned endpoints until Kaseya posts a fix.
